subcodes.first_line: Thou beholdest me, O my God, and hearest my cry in this eventide. By Thy might, the raptures of longing for Thee and the fragrances of Thy garment have [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ترانی یا الهی و تسمع ندائی فیهذا الاصیل فو عزتک جذبات شوقک و نفحات قمیصک قد
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love as fire
